name: Feature request

title: "[Feature] "

assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What feels missing, awkward, or unnecessarily hard today?

## Proposed improvement

Describe the change you want to see.

## Why it matters

Explain the user or operator benefit.

## Extra context

Links, sketches, examples, or related protocol notes.
